name: authenticate_magic_link
description: Verify a magic link token after the user clicks it. Returns a session token, session JWT, and user details on success. Call this from your redirect URL handler.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The magic link token from the URL query parameter.

parameters.name: session_duration_minutes
parameters.description: How long the session should last in minutes (5-527040). Defaults to 60.

parameters.name: session_token
parameters.description: An existing session token to extend rather than creating a new session.

parameters.name: session_custom_claims
parameters.description: Custom claims to include in the session JWT.
